findings.message: list_items(session) fetches full Item ORM objects (id, name, created_at) but only the name column is consumed. The unused columns are hydrated into Python objects and immediately discarded. Bounded at MAX_PAGE_SIZE=100 so real-world impact is negligible, but it is unnecessary work on every call to this endpoint.
findings.suggestion: Add a projection query to the repository (e.g. session.scalars(select(Item.name).order_by(Item.id).limit(bounded))) or accept a columns argument in list_items so the caller can request only Item.name, avoiding the allocation and deserialization of id and created_at.
